headline: Oil prices fall to around $100 after Trump indicates war could end in weeks
summary: Crude prices fell Wednesday as President Donald Trump signaled a willingness to exit the Iran war even as the Strait of Hormuz remains largely closed.

headline: 3 TSX Penny Stocks With At Least CA$100M Market Cap
summary: As the Canadian market navigates the complexities of inflation and energy price fluctuations, investors are keeping a close eye on economic indicators and central bank policies. In this context, penny stocks—often representing smaller or newer companies—remain an intriguing investment area despite their somewhat outdated label. These stocks can offer unique opportunities for growth and value, particularly when backed by strong financials, making them a compelling choice for those looking to...
